#  | Whitehill Support

> RoSCO is one of many store-based establishments on the Roblox playform that strive to provide a realistic, interactive, and welcoming experince for all. Our staff and HR teams work hard to ensure that our visions are borught to life.

- [👋 Welcome!](https://support.whitehill.group/index.md): 👋 Welcome!

## Tickets

- [Ticket Creation Reasons](https://support.whitehill.group/tickets/ticket-creation-reasons.md): TOC
- [Player Report Format](https://support.whitehill.group/tickets/player-report-format.md): When creating a ticket for a player report, community members should use the format found below. Any player report not following the format will be ignored.
